Index.title: Monitor Your Website's Global Performance
Index.subtitle: Test uptime, latency, and DNS resolution from 20+ locations worldwide. Fast, free, and reliable network monitoring.

Metadata.pingTitle: Ping Online - Check Website Connectivity Worldwide
Metadata.pingDesc: Test ICMP ping to any host or IP from multiple global locations. Check latency and packet loss in real-time.
Metadata.httpTitle: HTTP Check - Monitor Website Uptime & Performance
Metadata.httpDesc: Verify HTTP status and response times from 20+ global locations. Fast, reliable uptime monitoring for any website.
Metadata.dnsTitle: DNS Lookup - Check DNS Records Worldwide
Metadata.dnsDesc: Verify global DNS propagation. Check A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, and TXT records across multiple nameservers instantly.
Metadata.ipinfoTitle: IP Info & Geolocation - Detailed Network Intelligence
Metadata.ipinfoDesc: Find detailed geolocation, ISP, and network data for any IP address or domain. Multiple provider comparison.
Metadata.checksTitle: Diagnostic Tools - Global Website Performance Monitoring
Metadata.checksDesc: Comprehensive website diagnostic tools including Ping, HTTP, DNS, SSL, and MTR checks. Multimodal analysis from 20+ locations.

Dashboard.activeMonitorsDesc: Set up automated uptime and performance tracking for your domains.
Dashboard.apiUsageDesc: Check limits and track your CheckHost API consumption.
Dashboard.adminAccessLevelDesc: You are logged in as an Administrator. You have full access to the administrative control panel.
Dashboard.userAccessLevelDesc: You are logged in as a standard user. You do not have access to the administrative control panel.

GlobalActivityFeed.title: Global Activity Feed
GlobalActivityFeed.subtitle: Recent check requests from users across the platform.
GlobalActivityFeed.noActivityFound: No activity found matching your filters.

dashboard.title: Administrator Console
dashboard.subtitle: Status overview for all system services

audit.title: Security Audit Logs
audit.subtitle: Timeline of all administrative actions in the system
audit.searchPlaceholder: Search by email, action or entity type...

access.title: Access Control
access.subtitle: Manage administrative roles and permissions
access.googleAccountsDesc: Users who can authenticate via Google OAuth
access.envAdminsNote: Environmental admins from .env.local have persistent access.
access.strongCredsNote: Use strong credentials for fallback access.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage core system behavior and global configurations
settings.maintenanceDesc: When active, the site will show a maintenance page to all non-admin users. Use this for major updates.
settings.globalNoticeDesc: Display a persistent message at the top of every page.
settings.snapshotRetentionDesc: Configure how long shared result snapshots are kept before automatic deletion.
settings.dataCleanupNote: Caution: This action is permanent and affects all users.
settings.seoDesc: Global site metadata for search engines and social sharing.
settings.aiDesc: Provide API keys from AI providers to enable automated blog generation and cover images.
settings.masterPromptDesc: Customize the instructions sent to ALL AI models for article generation.
settings.leaveEmpty: Leave empty to use the system default prompt.
settings.sitemapDesc: Automatically generated pages from user searches to boost organic traffic.

blog.title: Blog Management
blog.subtitle: Write, publish, and auto-generate articles for your audience
blog.noArticlesDesc: Add keywords to the AI tab and click "Generate Now".
blog.genSuccessDraft: Saved as DRAFT — review in Posts tab and click Publish.
blog.addToQueueDesc: One keyword per line. Configure target languages and provider below.
blog.queueEmptyDesc: Add keywords above to start auto-generating multilingual articles.
blog.schedulerDesc: Configure external cron to hit GET /api/cron/tick?secret=... every 15 min
blog.defaultSettings: Default settings for all keywords above
blog.overrideSettings: Override settings for this keyword only

ads.title: Ad Manager 2.0
ads.subtitle: Visually manage your ad zones and placements
ads.adSenseDesc: Global activation and Client ID configuration.
ads.professionalSetupDesc: Zones highlighted in blue on the layout preview are active. Click any zone to edit its parameters.
ads.liveEditing: Live Ad Editing is Now Active
ads.liveEditingDesc: Open any page on your website and click the X-RAY button in the top navigation bar to edit ad slots directly in their natural context.
ads.fallbackEditorDesc: Select a zone below if you need to edit parameters manually.
ads.presetsNote: Pre-set common dimensions for better click-through rate.
ads.dynamicRulesDesc: Target specific pages or tabs with custom ad configurations.
ads.noRules: No dynamic rules defined. Standard zones will be used.
